General.Name: Top Education Group Ltd
General.Description: Top Education Group Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, provides private higher education services and English language courses in Australia. The company also offers undergraduate courses in law, business, management, accounting, and finance; and postgraduate courses in information technology, accounting, international business, marketing, and business administration. It also provides education consulting services, education and training services, as well as invests in education services. Top Education Group Ltd was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Eveleigh, Australia.
